title: I want to hire a Monday Expert ASAP!
excerpt:
Essentially what I wanna have are: 
-Inventory System (very particular with a few measurements) 
-Sales System 
-Sales and Inventory Dashboard 
I’m new to Monday and I tried myself to do it but it seems it’s taking a lot…

posts.author: johnnysins (johnny)
posts.cookedHtml:
Essentially what I wanna have are:
-Inventory System (very particular with a few measurements)
-Sales System
-Sales and Inventory Dashboard

I’m new to Monday and I tried myself to do it but it seems it’s taking a lot of my time so that’s why I need help.

posts.cookedHtml: I appreciated it my friend. I’m gonna reach out to him.

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @johnnysins

upstream can help. We are Platinum Partners, monday.com Preferred Partners and APAC Partner of the Year for 2020. Based in Australia, we have a global staff network encompassing dedicated teams.

You’ll have access to our Solutions Engineers as well as our full stack Development Team who specialize in integrations and custom requirements. We also have an Inventory System built out, I’d be happy to show you.

Please feel free to return by email directly via peta@upstreamtech.io alternatively you can book straight into my calendar for a meeting using the below link. I would be very interested to meet with you and better understand your use case.

Meet with Peta

If you’re based in Europe/USA, please use this link for more accommodating meeting times: international clients - special hours

Kind regards,
Peta - upstream

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @johnnysins !

Welcome to the community!

I work with a monday.com partner called Lucid Day. Our Team has actually created an inventory solution in monday.com that is specific to your use case.

There are two options that you can view:
Shipment Inventory Solution
Loaned Inventory Solution

Our team has also been a part of multiple sales system implementations. We has set up complex systems that included the following KPI:

  • Leads
  • Lead sources
  • Revenue
  • Deal Revenue
  • CRMs (Added for maintaining relationships)
  • Opportunities
  • Call Management

We would love to meet up with you and talk more about your needs! You can sign up for a FREE consultation here.

Excited to hear from you. Have a great day!
